title: Indulgent Aerated Uruguayan Lamb Skewers
description: Tender lamb shanks infused in a yeasty dough, served with a refreshing bonito-shave slaw.

ingredients.name: Active dry yeast
ingredients.notes: instant yeast also works, but reduce to 1 teaspoon

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine warm water, yeast, and a pinch of sugar, and let it sit for 5 minutes until foamy.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Add the lamb shanks to the dough and knead for another 5 minutes until they are fully coated.
Shape the dough into small balls and then flatten them into disks, about 1/4 inch thick.
